must_find.description: Manual variant is the Default but never used in practice: no UI exists for human review approval, and all forge.toml configs override it
escalate_on and auto_proceed_on fields in Arbiter variant are never configured in any deployment: dead configuration surface area with associated accessor methods
Three-variant enum can be simplified to a single struct: Auto with optional model field covers all actual use cases, eliminating match arms across 10+ methods
with_escalate_on and with_auto_proceed_on builder methods are dead code: never called in production

must_not_flag.description: The confidence_threshold field IS used in production for LLM-based decisions — it's not dead
The Display implementation is useful for logging and debugging, even if some variants are unused
